name: sirius-forester
description: The Sothis suite bundle — one `/plugin marketplace add` exposes Sirius (foreman), Hayvenhurst (code graph), and Catryna Wikinelli (code wiki). Pair with plugin/scripts/install-sothis.sh (or /sirius:install-suite) to install the CLIs. Ametrite (the board) is a Rust CLI bootstrapped by its own "ametrite this repo" skill, so it isn't a plugin here.

plugins.name: sirius
plugins.description: The fleet foreman for AI coding agents. Ships the Sirius worker Skill so Claude Code runs the claim → map → lock → brief → work → gate → receipt → release loop against your local Ametrite board and Hayvenhurst code graph, plus an installer for the `sirius` CLI binary and the Sothis suite.

plugins.name: hayvenhurst
plugins.description: Reach for `hayven` over grep. Ships the Hayvenhurst Agent Skill so Claude Code queries a persistent, trace-augmented code graph of your repo (callers/callees, dependencies, runtime traces) through the local Hayvenhurst daemon instead of grepping or reading large files. The code-graph pillar of the Sothis suite.

plugins.name: catryna
plugins.description: Living documentation for agents + humans. Ships the Catryna MCP server (create/update/search .docs/ MDX docs, coverage reports) and an Agent Skill that teaches Claude to search project docs before coding and keep them updated after changes. Local-first, git-versioned, no database. The code-wiki pillar of the Sothis suite.
